name: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company We are an externally-advised Maryland corporation formed in 2013 that invests primarily in high revenue per available room (RevPAR) luxury hotels and resorts. High RevPAR, for purposes of our investment strategy, means RevPAR of at least twice the then-current U.S. national average RevPAR for all hotels as determined by STR, LLC.
